name: Akhilesh Ranjan Singh
title: Platform Engineer | DevOps Engineer | MLOps Engineer
tagline: Building scalable cloud infrastructure on Kubernetes & GCP.
aboutMe: Cloud platform and MLOps engineer with 7+ years of hands-on experience designing secure Kubernetes foundations, reusable infrastructure platforms, GitOps delivery systems, and production AI/ML workflows. I translate business, security, reliability, and cost requirements into pragmatic reference architectures that engineering teams can adopt at scale.
aboutJourney: My journey progressed from Linux operations and automation to cloud platform design, Kubernetes architecture, GitOps, DevSecOps, observability, and MLOps. Across TCS, Tech Mahindra, and Capgemini, I have worked at the intersection of application teams, infrastructure, security, and operations — turning recurring delivery problems into reusable platform patterns. My approach combines architecture ownership with hands-on implementation: define the target state, document trade-offs, build the golden path, automate governance, and measure adoption and reliability.
